'''jayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bicentennially|bicentennially]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bicentennially|bicentennially]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jayate|jayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jayatesher|jayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jayatesherĂ«m|jayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jayatero|jayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jayateshĂ«|jayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jayateshĂ«m|jayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijayatero|gokijayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijayateshĂ«|gokijayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijayateshĂ«m|gokijayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojayankerom|gojayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojayankeshĂ«|gojayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojayankeshĂ«m|gojayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojayankeya|gojayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jayaterom|jayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jayatemu|jayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jayateya|jayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijayaterom|gokijayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijayatemu|gokijayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijayateya|gokijayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jayayate|jayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jayayatesher|jayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jayayatesherĂ«m|jayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jayayatero|jayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jayayateshĂ«|jayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jayayateshĂ«m|jayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijayayatero|gokijayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijayayateshĂ«|gokijayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijayayateshĂ«m|gokijayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojayayankerom|gojayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojayayankeshĂ«|gojayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojayayankeshĂ«m|gojayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojayayankeya|gojayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jayayaterom|jayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jayayatemu|jayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jayayateya|jayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijayayaterom|gokijayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijayayatemu|gokijayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijayayateya|gokijayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠyĂŠte|jĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠyĂŠtesher|jĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠyĂŠtero|jĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠyĂŠtero|gokijĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠyĂŠterom|jĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠyĂŠtemu|jĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠyĂŠteya|jĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠyĂŠterom|gokijĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠyĂŠteya|gokijĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafyafte|jafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafyaftesher|jafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafyaftesherĂ«m|jafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafyaftero|jafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafyafteshĂ«|jafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafyafteshĂ«m|jafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafyaftero|gokijafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafyafteshĂ«|gokijafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafyafteshĂ«m|gokijafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafyafnkerom|gojafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafyafnkeshĂ«|gojafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafyafnkeshĂ«m|gojafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafyafnkeya|gojafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafyafterom|jafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafyaftemu|jafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafyafteya|jafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafyafterom|gokijafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafyaftemu|gokijafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafyafteya|gokijafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
